query:
-- فحص تفاصيل الدفعة
SELECT * FROM payroll_batches WHERE batch_code = 'Batch-2026-02-001';

-- فحص عناصر الدفعة مع أسماء العمال
SELECT 
  pbi.id,
  pbi.worker_id,
  w.full_name AS worker_name,
  w.code AS worker_code,
  pbi.days_worked,
  pbi.base_amount,
  pbi.total_deductions,
  pbi.total_bonuses,
  pbi.net_amount,
  g.name AS group_name,
  g.minute_cost AS group_minute_cost,
  g.daily_wage AS group_daily_wage,
  g.work_minutes AS group_work_minutes
FROM payroll_batch_items pbi
JOIN payroll_batches pb ON pbi.batch_id = pb.id
JOIN workers w ON pbi.worker_id = w.id
LEFT JOIN `groups` g ON w.group_id = g.id
WHERE pb.batch_code = 'Batch-2026-02-001'
ORDER BY pbi.id;
